nasb.text: The king of Babylon has heard the report about them, And his hands hang limp; Distress has gripped him, Agony like a woman in childbirth.

esv.text: “The king of Babylon heard the report of them, and his hands fell helpless; anguish seized him, pain as of a woman in labor.

cnv.text: 巴比倫王聽了有關他們的消息， 手就發軟； 痛苦緊緊抓住他， 他疼痛好像正在生產的婦人。

ccb.text: 巴比伦王闻风丧胆， 四肢发软， 像分娩的妇人一样痛苦不堪。
